howItWorks.intro: This candle wax calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Wax Weight
rules.explanation: Wax is lighter than water, so use 86% of container volume.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Multiply container fluid ounces by 0.86 to get wax weight in ounces.

faq.q: What is the max fragrance load?
faq.a: Most waxes handle 6-10%. Exceeding the limit causes sweating and poor burns.
